mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite (user_id, type, title, content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, type, title, content, created_at FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND type = #{type} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, user_id, type, title, content, created_at FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorite WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
